name: Montana Capital Car Title Loans
description_short: 4538 S Pennsylvania Ave, Oklahoma City, OK — Montana Capital Car Title Loans for fast auto title cash.
description_long:
Montana Capital Car Title Loans in Oklahoma City is located at 4538 S Pennsylvania Ave, a standalone storefront on the south side. The Oklahoma City branch is open Monday through Friday from 9 AM to 7 PM, with Saturday hours from 9 AM to 5 PM, and closed Sundays. This convenient location serves Oklahoma City residents seeking quick access to title loan services.

At this Oklahoma City location, you can apply for auto title loans, payday advances, and other short-term financial solutions. Call +1 405-643-6752 to speak with a loan officer about your options, discuss terms, or schedule an appointment. The staff at this Pennsylvania Ave branch can often process applications quickly.

If you need quick cash in Oklahoma City and have a vehicle title, bring a valid ID, proof of residency, and your vehicle title when visiting. Montana Capital Car Title Loans specializes in converting your vehicle's equity into fast cash when other options aren't available.
address: 4538 S Pennsylvania Ave a, Oklahoma City, OK 73119

company_info.headquarters: 4538 S Pennsylvania Ave a, Oklahoma City, OK 73119

pros: Loan amounts up to $50,000 — unusually high ceiling for a title lender
Same-day funding available in qualifying circumstances
No credit check; bad credit and prior bankruptcies explicitly accepted
Borrower keeps driving their vehicle throughout the repayment period
Free pre-approval in under 5 minutes with no credit score impact
In operation since 2007 with 375,000+ customers served
4.5-star Google rating with multiple reviews citing fast turnaround and helpful staff
cons: No interest rates, APRs, or fee schedules disclosed anywhere on the website
Loan disbursement may be a Bank of America check rather than cash or instant deposit
Vehicle repossession is an implicit consequence of default on any title loan — not disclosed prominently
Only 59 Google reviews for a company claiming 375,000+ customers served raises questions about review coverage
State availability not listed — title loans are banned or heavily restricted in many US states
best_for: Vehicle owners with poor credit or prior bankruptcy who need fast emergency cash
Borrowers who need a larger secured loan ($5,000–$50,000) and cannot qualify elsewhere
People needing $100–$2,000 same-day with no credit check
Those who have been turned down by banks or personal loan lenders and own a car outright
diagnosis: Montana Capital is best suited for vehicle owners with damaged credit who need urgent access to cash and have no lower-cost alternatives — particularly those who need more than a typical payday loan can provide. The primary caveat is that the site discloses no pricing information whatsoever, and title loans as a product class carry high APRs and the risk of losing your vehicle if you default, making this a last-resort option that warrants careful comparison before committing.
services: Free pre-approval with no credit score impact
Bank of America check pickup at local branches
meta_description: Montana Capital Car Title Loans at 4538 S Pennsylvania Ave, Oklahoma City, OK. Quick auto title loans & payday advances.
